title: The Deletion Pits
story: Cursed glyphs crawl across the walls. Your blade can cut a letter (x), a word (dw), or an entire line (dd).

challenges.intro: A stray letter corrupts the war cry. Cut it.
challenges.hint: x deletes the character under the cursor.

challenges.intro: Lift the curse from the goblin. Delete the cursed word.
challenges.hint: dw deletes from the cursor through the end of the word.

challenges.intro: One inscription must burn. Erase the entire middle line.
challenges.hint: dd deletes the whole current line.
